prestazioni: Engine: Skyactiv-G 2.5L Turbo (PY-VPTS) with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (82mm compressor, 62mm turbine) paired with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe featuring a 400-cell catalytic converter from Milltek Sport for optimized exhaust flow and reduced backpressure.

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors (1050cc/min) with a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup and a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump to support E85 flex-fuel tuning via a Cobb Accessport V3 with a custom dyno-tuned map targeting 320whp and 400Nm torque (stock: 250hp/420Nm).

Suspension & Handling: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (CX-8-specific valving) with 20mm front and 15mm rear lowering springs, paired with Whiteline front sway bar (24mm adjustable) and rear sway bar (22mm adjustable) to reduce body roll. Polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0119K) replace all factory suspension mounts for improved rigidity.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny CX-8 widebody kit (Pandem Design) with carbon fiber front lip, side skirts, and rear diffuser, complemented by a custom 3D-printed rear spoiler (120mm height) from Maxton Design for aggressive downforce at speed.

Wheels & Tires: Enkei PF07 20x9.5 +35 (front) and 20x10.5 +40 (rear) in Hyper Black finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/40/20 front, 295/35/20 rear) for maximum grip. Fender flares are rolled and pulled using a Eastwood fender roller for clearance.

Exterior & Lighting: Full dechroming with LUX HID 5500K Bi-Xenon projector headlights (CX-8-specific housing) and sequential LED taillights from VLand. Carbon fiber mirror caps (Seibon) and a custom matte vinyl wrap in Mazda Soul Red Crystal Metallic with a satin clear coat for a stealth OEM+ finish.
